'''Xucphra City''' was the site of [[Thyferra/Legends|Thyferra's]] primary [[Spaceport/Legends|starport]] and served as the [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] [[Capital/Legends|capital]]. Established as '''Zalxuc City''' at the height of the [[New Order/Legends|New Order]] to house the [[Human/Legends|Human]] population of the planet, the residents were responsible almost solely for the production of [[Bacta/Legends|bacta]] even though they numbered just 10,000. When [[Ysanne Isard]] took control of [[Xucphra Corporation|Xucphra]] and bacta production, many [[Zaltin Corporation|Zaltin]] families fled the planet. The [[City/Legends|city]] was then renamed Xucphra City.

During the [[Swarm War]], Zalxuc was one of the cities captured by the [[Killik/Legends|Killiks]].

{{City-stub}}
